title: Texas Instruments 2025 Annual Report
note: Primary source for TI's business model, competitive advantages, 2025 operating margin, markets, and analog and embedded processing focus.

title: TI reports Q4 2025 and 2025 financial results and shareholder returns
note: Provides 2025 revenue and segment results, including Analog and Embedded Processing revenue.

title: Texas Instruments (TXN) - P/E ratio
note: Market-data snapshot for May 2026 market capitalization, approximate rank, share price, and trailing P/E.

title: Ibex CPU
note: Documents an Apache-2.0 open-source RISC-V embedded processor core relevant to open embedded processor alternatives.

title: PULPino: An open-source microcontroller system based on RISC-V
note: Open-source RISC-V microcontroller system used as evidence for open embedded-control alternatives.

title: OpenROAD unified RTL-to-GDS flow
note: Open-source IC implementation flow with documented tapeout usage and public PDK support, relevant to open silicon enablement.

title: Tiny Tapeout
note: Shared silicon shuttle and education platform relevant to lower-cost, community-scale chip design and fabrication experiments.

title: KiCad EDA
note: Open-source PCB design tool used as evidence for open hardware board-level replacement workflows around analog and embedded systems.
